executives.name: Bruce Kiddoo
executives.background: Bruce E. Kiddoo has served as a director since 2020. He previously served as Chief Financial Officer of Maxim Integrated Products, Inc. from 2007 to 2019.

executives.name: Eric Brandt
executives.background: Mr. Brandt has been a director since 2011. He was Executive Vice President and CFO of Broadcom Corporation.

executives.name: Henry Samueli, Ph.
executives.background: Dr. Samueli has served as Chairman of the Board since 2018. He co-founded Broadcom Corporation in 1991 and served as its Chief Technical Officer and a director until its acquisition by Broadcom Inc. in 2016. He is a Fellow of the IEEE and a member of the National Academy of Engineering.

tenure_dates.title: Co-Founder, Chief Technical Officer, Chairman of the Board

executives.name: Robert Switz
executives.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of ADC Telecommunications.

executives.name: Scott McGregor
executives.background: Scott McGregor was President and CEO of Broadcom Corporation from 2005 to 2016. He also served as President and CEO of the Philips Semiconductors division of Royal Philips Electronics.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director
